concepts_list.name: Omega_domain
concepts_list.description: Computational domain for the finite element simulation
concepts_list.justification: Appears as <mi>Ω</mi> in multiple equations describing the problem setup. Specifically, in Eq. (8) and in the integral definitions.

concepts_list.name: delta_Omega_boundary
concepts_list.justification:
Referenced as <mstyle id="custom-group-1" class="custom-group"><mi id="mi_239">∂</mi>
              <mi id="mi_240">Ω</mi>
            </mstyle> in Eq. (10), representing the boundary.

concepts_list.name: C_ijkl
concepts_list.justification:
Defined as <msub id="msub_85">
                <mrow>
                  <mi id="mi_223">C</mi>
                </mrow>
                <mrow>
                  <mi id="mi_224">i</mi>
                  <mi id="mi_225">j</mi>
                  <mi id="mi_226">k</mi>
                  <mi id="mi_227">l</mi>
                </mrow>
              </msub> in Eq. (2).

concepts_list.name: u_kl
concepts_list.justification:
Appears as <msub id="msub_86">
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_228">u</mi>
              </mrow>
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_229">k</mi>
                <mo>,</mo>
                <mi id="mi_230">l</mi>
              </mrow>
            </msub> in Eq. (1c), representing displacement.

concepts_list.name: u_lk
concepts_list.justification:
Appears as <msub id="msub_87">
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_231">u</mi>
              </mrow>
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_232">l</mi>
                <mo>,</mo>
                <mi id="mi_233">k</mi>
              </mrow>
            </msub> in Eq. (1c), representing displacement.

concepts_list.name: v_ij
concepts_list.justification:
Appears as <msub id="msub_88">
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_234">v</mi>
            </mrow>
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_235">i</mi>
              <mo>,</mo>
              <mi id="mi_236">j</mi>
            </mrow>
          </msub> in Eq. (1c), representing displacement.

concepts_list.name: f_i
concepts_list.description: Components of the body force vector
concepts_list.justification:
Defined as <msub id="msub_93">
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_248">f</mi>
            </mrow>
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_249">i</mi>
            </mrow>
          </msub> in Eq. (1a), representing the body force.

concepts_list.name: sigma_ij
concepts_list.justification:
Appears as <msub id="msub_80">
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_207">σ</mi>
            </mrow>
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_208">i</mi>
              <mi id="mi_209">j</mi>
            </mrow>
          </msub> in Eq. (1a), representing stress.

concepts_list.name: f_i
concepts_list.justification:
Defined as the vector of body forces <msub id="msub_90">
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_241">F</mi>
            </mrow>
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_242">i</mi>
            </mrow>
          </msub>.

concepts_list.name: C_ijkl
concepts_list.justification:
Defined as <msub id="msub_81">
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_210">C</mi>
              </mrow>
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_211">i</mi>
                <mi id="mi_212">j</mi>
                <mi id="mi_213">k</mi>
                <mi id="mi_214">l</mi>
              </mrow>
            </msub> in Eq. (2).

concepts_list.name: v
concepts_list.justification:
Used as variable <msub id="msub_82">
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_228">u</mi>
              </mrow>
              <mrow>
                <mi id="mi_229">k</mi>
                <mo>,</mo>
                <mi id="mi_230">l</mi>
              </mrow>
            </msub>.

new_concept_info.description:
Computational domain for the finite element simulation
JUSTIFICATION:
Appears as <mi>Ω</mi> in multiple equations describing the problem setup. Specifically, in Eq. (8) and in the integral definitions.

Components of the body force vector
JUSTIFICATION:
Defined as <msub id="msub_93">
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_248">f</mi>
            </mrow>
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_249">i</mi>
            </mrow>
          </msub> in Eq. (1a), representing the body force.

Body force
JUSTIFICATION:
Defined as the vector of body forces <msub id="msub_90">
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_241">F</mi>
            </mrow>
            <mrow>
              <mi id="mi_242">i</mi>
            </mrow>
          </msub>.
